user.title: Irrigation Proxy
user.description: Enter a name for this irrigation program.

zones.title: Zone Configuration
zones.description: Select the valve switch entities to control and set a default runtime. Per-zone durations can be fine-tuned later in the options.

data_description.zones: Select one or more switch entities that control irrigation valves.
data_description.duration_minutes: Default runtime per zone in minutes. Applied to every zone initially – change individual zones later in the options.

safety.title: Safety & Weather Settings
safety.description: Configure safety limits and the rain-skip threshold used by the binary sensor.

data_description.max_runtime_minutes: Maximum time a valve can stay open before the deadman timer forces it closed.
data_description.rain_threshold_mm: Combined recent + forecast precipitation (mm) that triggers the rain-skip binary sensor.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.description: Run the program automatically at the listed times on the selected weekdays. Leave disabled for fully manual control.

data_description.schedule_start_times: One or more HH:MM entries, e.g. "06:00, 20:30".
data_description.inter_zone_delay_seconds: Pause after each zone finishes, before the next zone starts.
data_description.rain_adjust_mode: off: ignore rain · hard: skip if rain ≥ threshold · scale: shorten or skip based on planned irrigation vs. expected rain.

error.no_zones_selected: Please select at least one valve entity.
error.invalid_start_times: Enter start times as HH:MM, separated by commas (e.g. "06:00, 20:30").

abort.already_configured: An irrigation program with this name already exists.

init.title: Irrigation Proxy Options
init.description: Modify zone selection and safety/weather settings.

durations.title: Per-Zone Durations
durations.description: Set an individual runtime in minutes for each of the {zone_count} selected zones.

schedule.title: Schedule & Rain Adjustment
schedule.description: Automatic start times, inter-zone delay and rain handling.

data_description.schedule_start_times: One or more HH:MM entries, e.g. "06:00, 20:30".
data_description.inter_zone_delay_seconds: Pause after each zone finishes, before the next zone starts.
data_description.rain_adjust_mode: off: ignore rain · hard: skip if rain ≥ threshold · scale: shorten or skip based on planned irrigation vs. expected rain.

error.no_zones_selected: Please select at least one valve entity.
error.invalid_start_times: Enter start times as HH:MM, separated by commas (e.g. "06:00, 20:30").

options.scale: Scale – shorten or skip based on planned irrigation

start_program.name: Start Irrigation Program
start_program.description: Start the configured irrigation program. Runs all zones sequentially.

stop_program.name: Stop Irrigation Program
stop_program.description: Stop the running irrigation program and close all valves.
